summary: Official repo-owned skill product line contract for OpenUI skill-shaped integrations. This surface includes starter bundles, proof loops, and troubleshooting for Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode-adaptable hosts, and OpenClaw without claiming an official listing.

codex.currentTruth: The repo ships a Codex Plugin Directory-ready bundle and MCP config, but it does not claim an official directory listing.

claudeCode.currentTruth: The repo ships a Claude Code marketplace-ready bundle and MCP config, but it does not claim an official marketplace listing.

openclaw.currentTruth: The repo ships an OpenClaw / ClawHub-ready skill bundle and MCP config, but it does not claim an official listing.

audience: maintainers packaging the official repo-owned OpenUI skill product line
builders evaluating a versioned skill surface before plugin or marketplace publication
agent operators who need a machine-readable starter manifest and honest proof anchors
builders assembling public-ready repo-owned bundles for OpenClaw-style or other skill-shaped hosts

surfaces.title: Installable skills-kit manifest
surfaces.role: machine-readable manifest for the repo-owned skill product line

surfaces.title: Starter example contract
surfaces.role: copyable example bounded by current builder truth

surfaces.title: Plugin-grade skill bundles
surfaces.role: copyable host configs for Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode-adaptable MCP hosts, and OpenClaw-style bridges

surfaces.title: Starter bundle troubleshooting
surfaces.role: bounded self-serve recovery note for install and proof failures

surfaces.title: Codex Plugin Directory-ready bundle
surfaces.role: repo-owned Codex bundle with plugin manifest, MCP config, and a shared delivery skill

surfaces.title: Claude Code marketplace-ready bundle
surfaces.role: repo-owned Claude bundle with plugin manifest, MCP config, and a shared delivery skill

surfaces.title: OpenClaw / ClawHub-ready skill bundle
surfaces.role: repo-owned skill bundle that makes OpenClaw public-ready without claiming listing truth

notFor: claiming SDK or hosted API publication by implication
claiming an official OpenClaw or ClawHub listing

officialSupportMatrix.codex: MCP server installation is officially supported; this starter bundle adds plugin-grade public packaging, not a Codex marketplace item.
officialSupportMatrix.claudeCode: MCP server installation is officially supported; this starter bundle adds plugin-grade public packaging, not a Claude Code marketplace item.
officialSupportMatrix.genericSkillHost: This product line can be adapted to other MCP-first skill-shaped hosts, but it does not prove vendor approval or publication.
officialSupportMatrix.openclaw: OpenClaw can be described as an official repo-owned skill product line through this bundle and the OpenClaw sample artifact; no official OpenClaw listing or verified runtime is claimed.
officialSupportMatrix.marketplace: No marketplace claim is made by this starter contract.
